description: A meaningful grouping of words that expresses a thought or feeling, forming a single unit within a larger expression. It is the first step in weaving words into a tapestry of meaning.
rationale: A composition of the roots 'pho' (a generative offering) and 'ni' (a state of being). The word's structure suggests 'an offering of being' or 'a complete utterance,' defining a phrase as a single, coherent unit of expression.
